author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Phase 4 COMPLETE. 4/4 subissues closed. 43 data tests. Implemented: Dataset/IterableDataset traits, VecDataset, MappedDataset, Sequential/RandomSampler, DataLoader with builder pattern (shuffle/drop_last/seed), Transform trait, Compose, Normalize, ToTensor, RandomHorizontalFlip, RandomCrop.
